what: stigmaR: Measuring and calculating structural stigma — stigmaR-package
title: stigmaR: Measuring and calculating structural stigma — stigmaR-package
text: Provides researchers pre-computed, state-level structural stigma scores derived Project Implicit's Implicit Association Test (IAT) public dataset. Users can merge sexuality-related stigma indices— including implicit bias, explicit attitudes, policy opposition, belief items—data frames using single function call, built-coverage reporting respondent-count filtering.

title: stigmaR: Measuring and calculating structural stigma — stigmaR-package

what: Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores from IAT Data — stigmaR
title: Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores from IAT Data — stigmaR
text: Merges state- year-level stigma indices derived Project Implicit IAT data dataset. New columns added format YYYY_iat_sex_index.

title: Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores from IAT Data — stigmaR
Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores from IAT Data — stigmaR
text: df data frame containing data. state Character string. Name column df containing two-letter state abbreviations (e.g., "IL", "CA"). index Character vector. One composite indices merge . Options : "iat_sex_implicit": IAT D-score (implicit pro-straight bias; higher = stigma) "iat_sex_explicit_therm": Average gay men + lesbian women feeling thermometers (reversed higher = stigma) "iat_sex_explicit_pol": Average policy opposition items (marriage rights, relations legality, adoption, service refusal, transgender bathroom) "iat_sex_explicit": Omnibus average across explicit items (therm + pol) year Character vector. Years merge (e.g., c("2016", "2017")). year x index combination becomes one new column named YYYY_iat_sex_index. Data available 2016 onward.

title: Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores from IAT Data — stigmaR
text: input data frame new columns named YYYY_iat_sex_index containing matched state-level stigma scores requested year index.

title: Calculate State-Level Stigma Scores from IAT Data — stigmaR
